# K-Maps

## Segment `a`

| Segment A |  Z  | Z'  |
| :-------: | :-: | :-: |
|   X'Y'    |  1  |  0  |
|    X'Y    |  1  |  1  |
|    XY     |  0  |  0  |
|    XY'    |  0  |  0  |

> Expression: `X'Y + X'Z`

## Segment `b`

| Segment B |  Z  | Z'  |
| :-------: | :-: | :-: |
|   X'Y'    |  0  |  0  |
|    X'Y    |  1  |  1  |
|    XY     |  0  |  0  |
|    XY'    |  0  |  0  |

> Expression: `X'Y`

## Segment `c`

| Segment C |  Z  | Z'  |
| :-------: | :-: | :-: |
|   X'Y'    |  1  |  1  |
|    X'Y    |  1  |  1  |
|    XY     |  0  |  0  |
|    XY'    |  0  |  0  |

> Expression: `X'`

## Segment `d`

| Segment D |  Z  | Z'  |
| :-------: | :-: | :-: |
|   X'Y'    |  1  |  0  |
|    X'Y    |  0  |  0  |
|    XY     |  0  |  0  |
|    XY'    |  0  |  0  |

> Expression: `Y'Z`

## Segment `e`

| Segment E |  Z  | Z'  |
| :-------: | :-: | :-: |
|   X'Y'    |  1  |  1  |
|    X'Y    |  0  |  1  |
|    XY     |  0  |  0  |
|    XY'    |  0  |  0  |

> Expression: `X'(Y'+Z')`

## Segment `f`

| Segment F |  Z  | Z'  |
| :-------: | :-: | :-: |
|   X'Y'    |  1  |  0  |
|    X'Y    |  1  |  1  |
|    XY     |  0  |  0  |
|    XY'    |  0  |  0  |

> Expression: `X'(Y+Z)`

## Segment `g`

| Segment G |  Z  | Z'  |
| :-------: | :-: | :-: |
|   X'Y'    |  1  |  1  |
|    X'Y    |  1  |  1  |
|    XY     |  1  |  1  |
|    XY'    |  1  |  1  |

> Expression: `G = 1`
